title: Militant Uncle Cooking Hour
description: Your favorite militant Māori uncle teaches you how to cook and how to resist.
quote: Now I’m going to slice these carrots like Hōne Heke chopped down the British flagpole at Waitangi in 1844.
altHero: Uncle Noogy, a Māori man wearing a beret and sunglasses, preparing a dish in the kitchen; there is a “Live, Laugh, Land Rights” sign on the wall
